titleStmt.title: SII 24.313: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 313. (A.R. No. 82 of 1937-38.) ĀRYABHAṬṬĀḶ-VĀŚAL, INNER WALL, RIGHT OF ENTRANCE.

summary.p: In Sanskrit written in Grantha, and Tamil verses. Records the structural improvements made by Chakrarāya to the Annādi-Emberumāṉ and the Māruti shrines and to the kitchen in the Raṅganātha temple, and the colonisation of the precincts of the temple of (Kāṭṭu) Aḻagiyaśiṅgar at Śrīraṅgam. The Sanskrit verses are said to be composed by Vyāsabhārati. The Tamil verses say that Chakrarāya constructed a passage with nine pillars to the south of the Perumāḷtōḻaṉ-tirumaṇḍapam and the tirukkāvaṇappatti in the maṇḍapa constructed by Uttamarāya, consecrated Māruti in the maṇḍapa constructed by him in front of the shrine of Annādi-Emberumāṉ and also consecrated Lakshmī in the porch near the entrance into the kitchen of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . vakṣa Iva cakrapāṇermmaṇinā mahitena kaustubhākhyena . śrīca
krarājavibhunā śrīraṅgandhāma san=tatandhanyam . [.1*] tapanena grahacakran=tārācakra yathendubimbena .
Ā cakrametadevam bhūcakram bhūṣṇu cakrarājena [.2*] Anudinamadhiraṅgamannadānam vidadhati viśruta
nāmni cakrarāje . karatalakalitāmapāsya durvvīm kalayati tasya kaṭākṣamannapū rṇā . [.3*]vyāsa
bhāratyā ḥ ślokāḥ . teṉpayiltāṟ perumāḷ toḻaṉ maṇṭapatteṟkiṟ patti yoṉapatu tūṇttirunaṭai
māḷikai yuṟpavamā maṉpataiyāvum purantarakecaṉ makuṭaparam taṉ paramāka varuñ cakrarāyaṉ camaittaṉaṉe .
Uttamarāyaṉulakeḻumatikkave vaitta periya tirumaṇṭapattilittalañ cūḻtikke
lāṅkāṇat tirukkāvaṇappatti cakrarāyaṉ camaittāṉ piṭiyuṅkaḷiṟum peru
m puliyu ṉiṅkā vaṭavi kaṭintu veḷiyākkik kuṭiyeṟṟic ciṅkaruṟai koyil
ciṟakkumpaṭi camaittāṉaṅkaimukil cakrarāyaṉ . poṉṉāṭar yoṟṟum pukaḻāṅkar ko
yil taṉi, laṉṉātiyemperumā ṉammukappil muṉṉāka, maṇṭapamum vaippittu mā
rutiyait tāpittā, ṉaṇṭamukil cakrarāyaṉ . teṉṉaraṅkar koyiṟṟirumaṭaippaḷḷitaṉil, maṉṉu
tiruvācalil muṉ maṇṭapaṅkaṇṭaṉa, ṉaruḷāṟpoṉṉār kamalamalaṟ pūntiruvaittāpit tāṉaṉṉāti cakrarāyaṉ .
Digital edition of SII 24.313 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
